## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.
## Minimal Reproduction
```rust
// Paste reproduction code here
```
## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.
## Environment
* OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
* Rust Version: [e.g., output of rustc --version]
* rustgames Version: [e.g., main branch commit hash, or crate version]

## Additional Context
If applicable, add any other context about the problem here. You can also include screenshots or logs if they help illustrate the issue.
